title: Orbital Wolf Cannon
body:
![owc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1d0da666e5eb4584b6099c8b57c41a270fc8b56.png)

---

# 🔫 Summon an army of dogs!

This data pack adds a special fishing rod that lets you summon 50, 100, or 200 war dogs!
All summoned dogs have enhanced stats to aid you in battle:

### 🏃‍♂️ Speed ​​- quickly catches up with enemies

### 🔥 Fire Resistance - resistant to lava and fire

### 💪 Strength - deals more damage

---

# ⚙️ Usage

1. Obtain a special fishing rod with the command:

<details>
<summary>Commands</summary>


```

/function orbital_wolf_cannon:give/owc_50
```


```
/function orbital_wolf_cannon:give/owc_100
```


```
/function orbital_wolf_cannon:give/owc_200
```


</details>



2. Use the fishing rod to summon an army of dogs:

---

# 🎮 Inspiration

FlameFrags' videos show how animals and mob armies can be used extensively in Minecraft playthroughs—this data pack allows you to do something similar and create epic scenes.

---

# 🧩 Compatibility

Works on Minecraft Java Edition

Compatible with other datapacks that don't change the fishing rod mechanics

---

# 💡 Usage Ideas

Base Defense from Mobs

PvP Arenas

Epic Boss Battles
